name: Reading husband's mind
description:
You have mind-reading powers, and by reading your husband's mind you discovered his hidden kinks.

Idk what else to put lol, this is the fempov I said I was going to do, just for the sake of doing a fempov for once.

And well, it's just the male equivalent of Martha, no more no less!

I guess that's all, thanks for the 300 followers btw.
creator: Stays
